query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM page_views; SELECT sessionKey, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM page_views GROUP BY sessionKey HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 10; SELECT DATE(createdAt) as day, COUNT(*) as visits, COUNT(DISTINCT sessionKey) as unique_sessions FROM page_views GROUP BY day ORDER BY day DESC LIMIT 14;
